landing.title: Online support courses with real follow-up, role-based access, and measurable progress.
landing.description: A front-end platform for students, teachers, and admins with planning, detailed course pages, tutor profiles, and multilingual support.

features.live: Live support classes with replay and structured remediation.
features.progress: Progress dashboards adapted to each role.
features.parent: Follow-up notes, alerts, and operational visibility.

login.title: Sign in and test each role interface.
login.description: This authentication is fake for the frontend stage. It will be replaced by the backend later.
login.chooseAccount: Use one of the test accounts

hero.student: Your student dashboard focuses on next sessions, learning progress, and homework follow-up.
hero.teacher: Your teacher dashboard focuses on classes, homework correction, and at-risk students.
hero.admin: Your admin dashboard focuses on operations, tutor supervision, and global activity.

messages.noteAmina: Improved in algebra exercises but still needs more speed on timed quizzes.
messages.noteYoussef: Missed two assignments. Parent call recommended before next session.
messages.noteSarra: Strong progress in spoken English. Suggested move to advanced group next month.

comingSoon.title: This section is planned for the next front milestone.
comingSoon.description: The page exists now so the navigation and layouts stay coherent while the remaining modules are being built.

forbidden.title: You do not have permission to access this page.
forbidden.description: This route is reserved for another role or requires additional backend rules.

server.title: A server error occurred.
server.description: The frontend intercepted a backend-style failure and redirected here.

notFound.title: Page not found.
notFound.description: The route you requested does not exist in the current frontend.
